Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; db=sqlite3.connect\('data/interviews.db'\); cursor=db.execute\(\\"SELECT * FROM voiceprints LIMIT 10\\"\); rows=cursor.fetchall\(\); print\([dict\(r\) for r in \(cursor.description or []\)]\); [print\(dict\(zip\([d[0] for d in cursor.description], r\)\)\) for r in rows]; db.close\(\)")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; db=sqlite3.connect\('data/interviews.db'\); cursor=db.execute\(\\"SELECT voice_id, name, provider, embedding IS NOT NULL and embedding != '[]' as has_emb FROM voiceprints\\"\); rows=cursor.fetchall\(\); [print\(r\) for r in rows]; db.close\(\)")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; db=sqlite3.connect\('data/interviews.db'\); cursor=db.execute\(\\"PRAGMA table_info\(voiceprints\)\\"\); rows=cursor.fetchall\(\); [print\(r\) for r in rows]; db.close\(\)")
